articles.description: The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) is listing three crypto assets that it considers to be commodities. In a fraud complaint filed in the United States District Court for the Southern District of New York against Sam Bankman-Fried, FTX and Alameda Research, the CFTC says that digital assets such as Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH) […]

articles.title: Solana ($SOL) Investment Products Keep Attracting Institutional Investors
articles.description: Institutional investors have kept on betting on the smart contract platform Solana ($SOL) through investment products focusing on the cryptocurrency. articles.title: US Senator Elizabeth Warren submits crypto know-your-customer bill in wake of FTX collapse
articles.description: As U.S. prosecutors line up charges against Sam Bankman-Fried, the founder of the collapsed FTX cryptocurrency exchange, Senator Elizabeth Warren is seeking to pass bipartisan regulation to rein in the "dark underbelly" of the crypto industry.
